title: Aon plc: Too Expensive Despite Financial Outperformance
text: Aon plc is a company I wrote about a few months back. I went neutral/'Hold' on the company due to valuation-related challenges above a share price of $300/share. While the company has performed well, I still hold my stance that this company is too expensive for the meager yield and the questionable upside it offers. I remain at 'Hold' - and here is why. There are better alternatives in the sector out there.
